chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.68 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders as to maintainability of instant criminal revision application --------------------------------------------- 21.04.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------- None present for applicant. Same position was on last four dates of hearings viz. 14.12.2023, 15.02.2024, 31.05.2024 and 16.08.2024. In terms of order dated 05.04.2023, learned counsel for applicant was directed to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of instant revision application. Continuous absence of applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue their case. However, applicant has impugned order dated 28.02.2023, which is reproduced as under: “In the interest of justice, IO is directed to get the forensic test done through National Forensic Science Agency Laboratory Islamabad, in order to observe fairness and satisfaction of an indene pent trial proceedings, on Govt. expenses. Application stands disposed off, accordingly.” Applicant has filed this criminal revision application on behalf of the witnesses and he was directed to satisfy the Court that how a witness is competent to impugn the order. Apparently, it appears that there is no illegality in the impugned order. Therefore, the instant criminal revision application is dismissed on merits, along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
